title: Crisis Residential Treatment - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Crisis Residential Treatment 4 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Disorders of Infancy/Childhood Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ALBERTINA KERR ALBERTINA KERR CRISIS PSYCHIATRIC CARE FOR YOUTH CRISIS PSYCHIATRIC CARE FOR YOUTH SUBACUTE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides safe and compassionate care to support youth stabilization, with most discharged within three weeks. The program offers a nurturing environment where youth can recover, reflect, and build skills for well-being and growth. Services include psychiatric evaluation and medication management, individual and family therapy, skill-building groups, daily therapeutic arts and recreation, continued school enrollment through Multnomah Education Service District, access to primary care assessments by nurse practitioners, and rapid psychological testing. 832 NE 162nd Avenue Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: Ages 5-17 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 408-4705 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH WASHBURN PHOENIX PLACE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides respite, residential care, and treatment for adults experiencing emotional and mental health crisis. 725 Washburn Way Klamath Falls, OR 97603 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 883-1030 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPTIONS FOR SOUTHERN OREGON INC CRISIS RESOLUTION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a co-occurring (mental health and addictions) treatment facility, specializing in providing secure psychiatric and addictions stabilization and respite services. 320 SW Ramsey Avenue Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Adults determined to have a chronic mental illness who are experiencing a psychiatric emergency and who may have co-occurring disorders Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 476-2373 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RIVERVIEW CENTER FOR GROWTH MOBILE RESPONSE AND STABILIZATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support to children experiencing a mental health crisis. Program crisis workers can provide assistance and referrals to help stabilize the situation, and create a short-term plan. On-site services available for more intensive intervention needs. The team may seek authorization for a brief, voluntary crisis care placement, approved by the parent. 3995 Marcola Road Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Families with youth age 20 and younger who are experiencing a mental health crisis Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (888) 989-9990 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ALBERTINA KERR CRISIS PSYCHIATRIC CARE FOR YOUTH SUBACUTE KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH PHOENIX PLACE OPTIONS FOR SOUTHERN OREGON INC CRISIS RESOLUTION CENTER RIVERVIEW CENTER FOR GROWTH MOBILE RESPONSE AND STABILIZATION SERVICES
